items.title: Practical Tetris Openers
items.description: This page shows practical setups that are widely used among players, depending on the order of pieces they get in their first starting bag

items.title: TKI
items.description: TKI is a very popular opener among tetris players where you send a TSD from the very start with your first bag

items.title: DT Cannon
items.description: DT Cannon is a very popular TSD → TST opener that is used when players have an early LS or JL

items.title: Perfect Clear Opener
items.description: A popular opener with an 84.64% chance of doing a perfect clear if you have I on hold.

items.title: Hachispin
items.description: A TSS → TST → PC opener created by hachispin

items.title: MKO
items.description: An opener where you stack your first bag in a way that allows you to follow up with either a perfect clear with a 33% chance or T-Spin Doubles.

items.title: C-Spin
items.description: A classic opener where you open with a TST → TSD.

items.title: BT Cannon
items.description: A BT Cannon → C-Spin → Perfect Clear loop created by 26_nameless that has a high chance of completing and continuing the loop

items.title: Mr. T-Spin's STD
items.description: A TSS → TST → TSD opener that can be used when you have an early SZ start, devised by Mr. T-Spin

items.title: Albatross
items.description: An Air-TSD → TST → TSD "bird" opener.

items.title: Triple Double
items.description: A TST → TSD setup often used mid-game

items.title: DT Cannon
items.description: A TSD → TST setup first outlined by TKI

items.title: Fractal
items.description: A TSD → TSD setup that is also known as "double dagger" in the Japanese community.

items.title: Imperial Cross
items.description: A TSD → TSD setup that looks like, well, an imperial cross

items.title: Parapet
items.description: A donation TSD/TSS technique which got its name because of how the J/L covering the hole resembles a parapet

items.title: Kaidan
items.description: A TSD donation technique that can be used when you see stairs

items.title: STMB Cave
items.description: STMB is an air T-Spin technique where you hang a S or a Z over a 3-wide column to create a TSD shape.

items.title: STSD
items.description: Short for Super T-Spin Double. This setup yields 2 T-Spin Doubles.

items.title: Shachiku Train
items.description: A donation TSD → TSD method.

items.title: Polymer T-Spins
items.description: Polymer T-Spins refer to T-Spin setups consisting of two or more of either Iso-, Neo-, or Fin-TSDs.

items.title: Yoshihiro SD
items.description: A TSM → TSD method

items.title: Anchor Set
items.description: A rarely used technique that is utilized in order to maintain Back-to-Back.

items.title: Finesse
items.description: An optimization technique which helps you play faster by reducing your keypresses per piece placed

items.title: Donation
items.description: An overview of donation, a technique of temporarily covering open columns underneath

items.title: Puyo Puyo Tetris
items.description: Notes on Puyo Puyo Tetris, a crossover game between Puyo Puyo and Tetris developed by Sega

items.title: Skimming
items.description: Skimming is a method where a player does a non-Back-to-Back line clear to make the stack more favorable.

items.title: LST Stacking
items.description: A very practical stacking method that can be used both in versus and Ultra, where you repeat L and S on the left column

items.title: Tetris
items.description: Counting to four is an essential skill that you should learn and utilize for mid-game tetrises

items.title: ST Stacking
items.description: A popular stacking method used in Ultra where you repeat S on the left column

items.title: 4-Wide
items.description: The infamous combo setup

items.title: Perfect Clear Opener
items.description: A popular opener where you have an 84.64% chance of doing a perfect clear if you have I on hold.

items.title: Grace System
items.description: An opener with an 88.57% chance of doing a perfect clear if you have T on hold.

items.title: 2nd PC
items.description: 90%+ 2nd PC patterns from knewjade that you could use after PCO or Grace System

items.title: DPC
items.description: TSD → PC setups that you can use after performing an 8-height PC

items.title: 7th PC
items.description: 100% PC patterns that you can use for your 7th consecutive PC

items.title: ILSZ
items.description: A 100% 1st PC pattern

items.title: 4th PC
items.description: 4-piece patterns that you can use for your 4th PC with your 5 leftover pieces

items.title: 3rd PC
items.description: You'll have an extra mino when starting your 3rd PC. These are some patterns that you could use for it

items.title: 5th PC
items.description: Some 2 + 4 piece patterns that you could use for your 5th PC

items.title: 6th PC
items.description: Some patterns that you could use for your 6th PC

items.description: An overview of how kicks work in SRS

items.title: T-Spin
items.description: How does the game detect T-Spins?

items.description: Illustrations and demonstrations of counterclockwise T Kicks in SRS

items.description: Illustrations and demonstrations of counterclockwise L Kicks in SRS

items.description: Illustrations of counterclockwise and clockwise I Kicks in SRS

items.title: Tetris Effect All Clear Mode Solutions
items.description: Diagrams and solutions to some of the non-straightforward maps on Tetris Effect's All Clear Mode

items.title: Tetris Effect Boss Abilities
items.description: A visual guide to boss abilities in Tetris Effect's Connected VS mode

items.title: Gamushiro Stacking
items.description: Gamushiro Stacking is a TST → TSD (or TSS) → PC opener created by KMGZ

items.title: New DT Cannon
items.description: A 5-bag TSD → TST → TSD → Tetris → PC loop based on DT Cannon

items.title: Sailboat
items.description: Sailboat is a TSS → TSS → TST opener created by ゆう

items.title: Single Double PC
items.description: A TSS → TSD → (TSS →) PC opener created by ゆう

items.title: Triple Triple PC
items.description: A TST → (TSS or TSD or TST →) PC opener created by ゆう

items.title: Black Tea Cannon
items.description: Black Tea Cannon is a TSD → TSD → 6-height or 8-height PC opener

items.title: 4-Wide 6-Residual Patterns
items.description: Diagrams of all possible 6-residual patterns for 4-Wide

items.title: Situational Finesse
items.description: Input sequences to place S and I pieces vertically at specific columns with an alternate orientation

items.title: Sakana's TSD → PC
items.description: 100% opening TSD → 6-height PC patterns found by Sakana

items.title: Viper
items.description: A TSD → PC opener that theoretically has a 99.999% chance of following up with a perfect clear after the first TSD

nodes.description: Diagrams of all possible 4-residual patterns for 4-Wide. Notably used by the MisaMino bot.
